text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 WSJ : Tensions between Iranian hard‑liners and more pragmatic officials are frustrating progress in talks with the United States, with divisions spilling into public view. Ultraconservative lawmakers have criticised lead negotiator Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf for putting the nuclear issue on the table, while the IRGC opposes major concessions. Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen or heard since his father’s death at the start of the war; analysts say the absence of a strong final arbiter makes it harder for Tehran to reach consensus. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYT : U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio has been absent from US‑Iran peace talks, including the upcoming round in Pakistan, as U.S. President Trump has outsourced diplomacy to envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner. Rubio holds the dual role of secretary of state and national security adviser – the first since Henry Kissinger – and has remained largely at home, travelling less than previous secretaries. Critics say the arrangement leaves the State Department sidelined, while the administration argues it ensures close co‑ordination with the White House. @wfwitness
🇺🇦 🇦🇿 Zelensky came to Azerbaijan 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Al-Akhbar : Saudi Arabia has forged a strategic partnership with Lebanese Parliament Speaker Nabih Berri, shifting its approach to stabilise Lebanon ahead of direct negotiations with Israel. Saudi envoy Prince Yazid bin Farhan held intensive meetings with Lebanese Presidents Aoun, Berri and Salam, urging national unity and reviving the troika (three presidencies) as a condition for any agreement. Riyadh is pressing Lebanon not to rush into talks with Israel and to wait for the outcome of the US‑Iran conflict. Saudi Arabia is also coordinating with Iran behind the scenes and insists on protecting the current government, with Berri seen as the sole guarantor of Shia participation and internal stability. @wfwitness

↩️ Reply to Рыбарь: "📝О горизонте войны на истощение📝 В интервью Михаила Звинчука с Анатолием Кузичевым прозвучал и вполне конкретный прогноз — тот, о котором в патриотической среде мало говорят. Речь о том, что удары ВСУ давно сместились с фронта на экономический контур страны:…" 📝 Будет ли мобилизация? 📝 Один из самых животрепещущих вопросов, который регулярно задают на стримах и в боте обратной связи, — нужна ли мобилизация и когда она будет. В интервью Михаила Звинчука с Анатолием Кузичевым эту тему, естественно, тоже не обошли стороной. Мнение военного руководства в целом сводится к следующему. Да, мобилизация нужна — но не потому, что людей не хватает в принципе. Поток желающих идти на контракт действительно не иссякает, очереди у военкоматов — это не успокоительные реляции чиновников, а реальная картина. Проблема в другом: в слаженности. За прошлый год до 80% потерь пришлись на так называемых «перворазников» — добровольцев и контрактников, которыми по двое-трое укомплектовывают уже воюющие штурмовые группы и отправляют на задачу практически с колёс. Потери случаются не потому, что сами бойцы плохо подготовлены, а потому, что подразделение вокруг них не слаженно — а слаженность быстро не делается. Чтобы эту проблему решить, с военной точки зрения нужно готовить полноценные новые соединения , которые будут действовать как единый организм. А для этого необходимо единовременное привлечение большого количества людей — отсюда и разговор о цифрах порядка миллиона человек и сроке около года. Это ни в коем случае не призывы к тотальной мобилизации, а скорее объяснение точки зрения военнослужащих — и в первую очередь той простой реалии, что военные потребности не всегда соответствуют политическим. #видео #интервью #Россия #Украина ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 Iran has executed Erfan Kiani, an Isfahan resident convicted of carrying out alleged intelligence missions for Israel’s Mossad during nationwide demonstrations in January. State broadcaster IRIB said Kiani led a group that destroyed public property, set fires and fired guns. The execution followed Supreme Court approval. Hengaw Organisation for Human Rights condemned the execution, noting it was the eighth of a protest‑related detainee since the outbreak of war. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said Turkey could consider taking part in demining operations in the Strait of Hormuz following a possible peace agreement between Iran and the United States. A technical team from various countries would carry out the work; Turkey views such efforts positively in principle as a humanitarian duty. Fidan added that he believes issues related to Iran’s nuclear programme could be resolved at the next round of talks in Pakistan. @wfwitness

The largest barracks in Sévaré has been taken, along with checkpoints at the entrances to Gao and Konna. Kati and Bamako have been “invested” by JNIM. The house of Defence Minister Sadio Camara in Kati has been destroyed, and a helicopter has been shot down in Gao. @wfwitness

Ukraine is always committed to cooperation that strengthens both our country and our partners. We have unique security experience that can also help other countries. We are already working on three directions: the Middle East and the Persian Gulf region, the European Union, and essentially cooperation with Azerbaijan. In addition to security cooperation, today we will work on deepening cooperation in energy, economy, and humanitarian areas. Glory to Ukraine! tweet

Visioner 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 Iranian Ministry of Defence spokesman said that Iranian armed forces controlled the skies of Israel right up until the ceasefire, and that a significant portion of the country’s missile capability remains unused. “This capability is the result of over 25 years of preparation and investment by the defence ministry, the armed forces, the private sector and knowledge‑based companies." He claimed that Iran’s missile superiority is now acknowledged by international observers. tweet

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Al-Akhbar: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has arrived in Islamabad for talks with Pakistani officials, but Tehran insists no meeting with American officials is planned. Iranian Foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baqaei said the visit is for bilateral consultations on ending the “aggressive war imposed by the US and the Zionist entity”. A Pakistani official told ABC that the two delegations will hold separate meetings with Pakistani officials, and if those go well, a direct meeting could take place on Sunday. @wfwitness
Photos said to be from the USS Abraham Lincoln show small meal portions being served to U.S. sailors. Source: Newsweek

⚡️ 🇮🇷 Tehran’s Imam Khomeini International Airport reopened on Saturday morning, with international flights resuming. The first passengers were flown to Medina, Muscat and Istanbul. Iran Air will resume scheduled flights to Baku, Najaf, Baghdad and Doha in the coming days. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s judiciary chief, Gholamhossein Mohseni‑Eje’i, said the anniversary of the U.S.’s "humiliating defeat" in Tabas has a different colour today. He claimed that "enemy commandos" were grounded in Isfahan during the war and suffered a heavy and instructive defeat at the hands of Iran’s armed forces. “The Americans should know that they are also incapable of imposing a naval blockade on Iran. Tabas and Isfahan will be repeated in the waters of the Persian Gulf,” he warned. @wfwitness
Taiwan’s Deputy Foreign Minister Francois Wu: What we are most afraid of is to put Taiwan on the menu of the talk between Xi Jinping and Trump. Source: Bloomberg

⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇷🇴 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 Russian forces launched drone attacks against civilian and infrastructure targets in Ukraine near the Romanian border in Tulcea County early Saturday, prompting two RAF Eurofighter Typhoons to scramble from Borcea Air Base. Romania’s MoD stated the pilots were authorized to engage drones and that multiple explosions were reported near Reni, Ukraine. However, the UK MoD said the Typhoons returned to base without engaging any Russian assets and did not enter Ukrainian airspace. Drone fragments fell in Galați, Romania, damaging an outbuilding and an electricity pole. @wfwitness

The US pressured the UK not to oppose Argentina’s purchase of F-16 fighter jets from Denmark in 2024. Britain was concerned due to tensions over the Falkland Islands, but had no direct veto. Source: The Telegraph

⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 The Kurdistan Regional Government of Iraq has documented 809 drone and missile attacks on the Kurdistan Region over a 50‑day period (28 February – 20 April 2026), resulting in 20 fatalities and 123 injuries. Drone attacks accounted for 701 of the incidents; missiles for 108. Erbil province was the hardest hit, with 477 attacks, 10 killed and 83 wounded. Despite maintaining neutrality in the US‑Israel‑Iran conflict, the region has suffered spillover damage. @wfwitness

BIG: British Royal Air Force Typhoon jets shot down Russian drones over Ukrainian territory near Reni early Saturday, after scrambling from Romania under NATO air policing. The aircraft engaged the drones while flying in Romanian airspace, targeting them across the border. Explosions were reported near Reni, and debris later fell in parts of Romania.

Visioner ‼️ 🇬🇧 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 BREAKING | For the first time since the start of the Russian invasion of Ukraine, Eurofighter Typhoon fighter jets of the Royal Air Force have shot down Russian kamikaze drones over Ukraine. According to the Romania’s Ministry of Defense, the Typhoons, operating under Operation Biloxi 2026 — the RAF’s four-month contribution to the NATO Enhanced Air Policing Mission over Romania — were granted clearance at dawn to engage and destroy the drones over southern Ukraine, near the city of Reni. The decision was made after several drones were detected heading toward Romanian airspace. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet

Visioner 🇺🇸 The chairman of the U.S. Senate Armed Services Committee, Roger Wicker, called on Donald Trump to renew offensive strikes on Iran and stated that "the time for negotiations with the Iranian government has run out." ⚔️ 🇮🇷 The Republican senator noted that the radical successors of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei cannot be trusted and they will not abide by any agreement. He urged the U.S. president to order military commanders to completely dismantle Iran's conventional military capabilities and destroy the remnants of its nuclear program. 🗣️ Wicker concluded by stating that this approach is the only way to achieve "long-term stability" in the region. tweet

OSINTdefender For the first time since the start of the Russian invasion of Ukraine, Eurofighter Typhoons with the British Royal Air Force have engaged and downed Russian one-way attack drones over Ukraine. According to Romania’s Ministry of Defense, the Typhoons, serving under Operation Biloxi 2026, the RAF’s four-month contribution to the NATO Enhanced Air Policing Mission over Romania, were given clearance to engage the drones over Reni in Southern Ukraine earlier this morning, after several were spotted heading towards Romanian Airspace. tweet

Türkiye may join demining efforts in the Strait of Hormuz after a potential Iran–U.S. deal, Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said. Fidan said Türkiye would have “no problem” taking part in mine-clearing operations, calling it a “humanitarian duty” in principle. Source: Reuters

Greek Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis: Greece and many other European countries stood by Cyprus when it was attacked in the context of the conflict between the United States, Israel, and Iran. I would say that this is the first tangible proof that Europe can, on its own, stand by member states of the European Union that are under threat.

Italian PM Meloni: I think this is the moment when we should be asking Putin to take some steps forward—not us toward him. Because we, especially the Americans in recent months, have made several moves toward Russia, and on the other side we haven’t seen the same level of progress.

Italian PM Meloni: For what concerns our relations with the United States, they are always solid, and as for my relationship with Donald Trump, there is nothing in particular that I am doing at this moment.
Italian PM Meloni: I don’t view the idea of Spain leaving NATO positively. I think NATO must remain united; it’s a source of strength.

Germany will send naval ships to the Mediterranean to prepare for a possible mission in the Strait of Hormuz. The deployment depends on approval from the German parliament, but ships are being positioned early to save time.

Federal authorities are seeking to seize a 30 million dollar Beverly Hills mansion owned by Mansour Barzani, alleging he used bribe money to buy it. The DOJ says Barzani took payments from a defense contractor that secured over 700 million dollars in U.S. military fuel contracts during the fight against ISIS. He allegedly funneled the money through a trust to purchase and renovate the property.

🔄 Forwarded from Two Majors - English Channel: ⚡️ Two Majors #Report for the morning of April 25, 2026 ▪️ In the Kaluga region , three UAVs were destroyed in the evening. After a UAV crashed in the Dzerzhinsky district at a production enterprise, a fire broke out in one of the buildings. In the morning in Yekaterinburg (1800 km from the front), a UAV hit a residential high-rise building, and 50 people were evacuated. From Chelyabinsk , reports of explosions and smoke were received in the area of the Chelyabinsk Metallurgical Combine. In the Rostov region , about a dozen UAVs were destroyed in 4 districts. In Crimea and Sevastopol , combat operations against aerial targets were also ongoing. ▪️ The Russian Armed Forces struck enemy territory with at least 25 missiles, including from strategic missile carriers. Before this, the enemy's air defense systems were suppressed with "Herbane" missiles. Multiple strikes occurred in the Kiev region, Dnepropetrovsk, Kharkov, Odessa, Izmail . ▪️ In the Sumy direction , the Army Group "North" is conducting stubborn infantry battles in the Miropolye area. The enemy is transferring reserves to this sector, and our troops are maintaining the initiative. In the Krasnopollya district, heavy infantry fighting continues near the village of Taratutyne, in Novodmitrovka, and the surrounding areas, in the Novodmitrovka area and the vicinity of the settlement, intense infantry battles are ongoing. ▪️ In the Kursk region , an FPV drone attacked a private house in the Shekino village of the Rylya district, injuring a local resident. ▪️ In the Belgorod region , two FPV drones attacked a tractor on the Red Yaruga - Vyazovoe road, injuring the driver. In the Gora-Podol village, a drone hit a car, which caught fire, and a woman was killed at the scene, while the car driver was seriously injured. ▪️ In the Kharkov direction , the Northern Group of Forces is conducting combat operations in the area of the Veterinarnoe settlement on the border, reporting progress of up to 250 meters per day. ▪️ In the Volchansk direction , assault units have advanced up to 900 meters in ten sectors. The enemy is trying to maintain control over the Bochkovo settlement. The enemy has transferred reserves to the banks of the Volchya River. In the Velikoburuluk direction, intense battles are ongoing in the Budarka village and the vicinity of the settlement. ▪️ In Kupyansk , the Russian Armed Forces are operating in urban areas, and on the south of the direction, our troops are approaching Koshvarka. ▪️ On the Slavyansk direction , our troops are increasing the pressure on the enemy's defenses in Rai-Aleksandrovka from the flanks: from the side of Lipovka and Kalenyky. ▪️ In Konstantinovka , the Ukrainian Armed Forces attempted to counter-attack with small groups in the private sector, but our troops repelled the attack and remained in their positions. The Ukrainian Armed Forces' operators are being eliminated by aviation, and the Russian Aerospace Forces are not sparing FABs. ▪️ On the Dobropolsk direction , the Russian Armed Forces are building on their success at Grishino in the south and at Sergeevka, forming a "pocket" with a throat width of up to 7 km. Intense battles are ongoing. ▪️ Army Group "East" reports that the enemy is maintaining high activity of infiltration groups both in the north ( Dnepropetrovsk region ) and in the west (the area of Gulyaypole ). Far Eastern soldiers are conducting a re-inspection of the territory: in the Dnepropetrovsk region from the line Stepovoe-Verbovoe and north, in the Zaporozhye region - the area of ravines and gullies in the northwest of Gulyaypole. ▪️ On the Zaporozhye front and in the Kherson region , there are no changes. In Veliki Kopany in the Kherson region, a man was injured in a car hit by a UAV. There are mutual drone strikes along the entire line of front sectors. The report was compiled by: ⚡️ Two Majors
